task_completion.description: Verify that Dell models (Optiplex, Latitude) are reassigned to the canonical 'Dell' manufacturer and the duplicate 'Dell Inc.' is deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Asset Models page showing 'Optiplex' and 'Latitude' associated with 'Dell'. Check the Manufacturers list to ensure 'Dell Inc.' is no longer present.

task_completion.description: Verify that HP models (Probook, EliteDisplay) are reassigned to the canonical 'HP Inc.' manufacturer and the duplicate 'Hewlett-Packard' is deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Asset Models page showing 'Probook' and 'EliteDisplay' associated with 'HP Inc.'. Check the Manufacturers list to ensure 'Hewlett-Packard' is no longer present.

task_completion.description: Verify that Lenovo models (Thinkpad) are reassigned to the canonical 'Lenovo' manufacturer and the duplicate 'Lenovo Group' is deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Asset Models page showing 'Thinkpad' associated with 'Lenovo'. Check the Manufacturers list to ensure 'Lenovo Group' is no longer present.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Cisco Systems' is registered as a new manufacturer with the correct contact details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Cisco Systems' in the Manufacturers list or its details page. It should display URL: https://www.cisco.com, Support URL: https://www.cisco.com/c/en/us/support/index.html, Phone: 1-800-553-2447, and Email: tac@cisco.com.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Catalyst 9300' asset model is created under the 'Cisco Systems' manufacturer and 'Networking' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Catalyst 9300' in the Asset Models list, showing 'Cisco Systems' as the manufacturer and 'Networking' as the category.

task_completion.description: Verify that no existing assets were deleted or orphaned during the manufacturer consolidation process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the All Assets page or Dashboard to ensure the total number of assets is preserved and there are no error messages indicating missing or orphaned assets.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for browser windows navigating the Snipe-IT application. The agent should not be using terminal windows to execute raw SQL queries or API scripts to manipulate the database directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application forms to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the agent actively filling out the 'Create Manufacturer' form, 'Edit Asset Model' form, or clicking the delete buttons in the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open and being used to alter text on the page to make it look like the task was completed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Canonical manufacturers to keep: 'Dell', 'HP Inc.', 'Lenovo'. Duplicate manufacturers to delete: 'Dell Inc.', 'Hewlett-Packard', 'Lenovo Group'. Cisco Systems details: URL (https://www.cisco.com), Support URL (https://www.cisco.com/c/en/us/support/index.html), Phone (1-800-553-2447), Email (tac@cisco.com). Cisco model: 'Catalyst 9300' in 'Networking' category.
